steps: File formal tax reclaim with ATO referencing AU-NO treaty 15% rate for Norwegian resident vs 25% withheld on BHP dividend
Submit Citigroup Australia custodian request with treaty evidence and client Norwegian tax residency documentation
Reference ATO dividend withholding rules and Treasury treaty table to support AUD 138,750 reclaim calculation
Follow up with Skatteetaten documentation showing Norwegian resident eligibility for reduced withholding rate

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
AU Treasury – Income Tax Treaties Table
